mapper.sql: id, avatar_url, account, password, name, nick_name, pinyin_abbr, student_no, group_id, gender, id_card, phone, phone_public, fixed_phone, fixed_phone_public, email, qq, wechat, address, mailing_address, zip_code, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, birth_date, education, major, native_place, school, nationality, signature, bio, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted

t.id, t.avatar_url, t.account, t.name, t.nick_name, t.pinyin_abbr, t.student_no, t.group_id, t.gender, t.id_card, t.phone, t.phone_public, t.fixed_phone, t.fixed_phone_public, t.email, t.qq, t.wechat, t.address, t.mailing_address, t.zip_code, t.emergency_contact, t.emergency_phone, t.birth_date, t.education, t.major, t.native_place, t.school, t.nationality, t.signature, t.bio, t.status, t.last_login_time, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.create_by, t.update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM edu_student t WHERE t.deleted = 0
AND (t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%') OR t.pinyin_abbr LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%'))
AND t.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.phone}, '%')
AND t.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.account}, '%')
AND t.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY t.id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_student WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_student WHERE account = #{account} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_student (avatar_url, account, password, name, pinyin_abbr, student_no, group_id, gender, id_card, phone, phone_public, fixed_phone, fixed_phone_public, email, qq, wechat, address, mailing_address, zip_code, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, birth_date, education, major, native_place, school, nationality, signature, bio, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{avatarUrl}, #{account}, #{password}, #{name}, #{pinyinAbbr}, #{studentNo}, #{groupId}, #{gender}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{phonePublic}, #{fixedPhone}, #{fixedPhonePublic}, #{email}, #{qq}, #{wechat}, #{address}, #{mailingAddress}, #{zipCode}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{birthDate}, #{education}, #{major}, #{nativePlace}, #{school}, #{nationality}, #{signature}, #{bio}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_student SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, name = #{name}, nick_name = #{nickName}, pinyin_abbr = #{pinyinAbbr}, student_no = #{studentNo}, group_id = #{groupId}, gender = #{gender}, id_card = #{idCard}, phone = #{phone}, phone_public = #{phonePublic}, fixed_phone = #{fixedPhone}, fixed_phone_public = #{fixedPhonePublic}, email = #{email}, qq = #{qq}, wechat = #{wechat}, address = #{address}, mailing_address = #{mailingAddress}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, education = #{education}, major = #{major}, native_place = #{nativePlace}, school = #{school}, nationality = #{nationality}, signature = #{signature}, bio = #{bio}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_student SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE edu_student SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE edu_student SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_student SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_student SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
